name: Slimmed Down Scalloped Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Yukon Gold potatoes; peel, slice
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate a small amount of nutmeg and fresh ground pepper.
2. Place the grated cheese in a shallow 2-quart baking or gratin dish.
3. Rub the inside of the dish with half a clove of garlic, halved.
4. Add the remaining minced garlic to a bowl.
5. Combine the sliced potatoes, skim milk, chopped onions, minced garlic, salt, nutmeg, and pepper in another bowl until well mixed.
6. Place the mixture into the prepared dish.
7. Measure out 1/4 cup of the milk mixture and whisk in reduced-fat sour cream.
8. Spread the sour cream mixture evenly over the potatoes.
9. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top.
10. Preheat the broiler.
11. Broil the potatoes until golden, about 2 to 3 minutes.
12. Serve immediately.
